passages.cleanText: Day 2

passages.text: You wake up feeling heavier than usual. With bleary eyes, you start your morning routine. [[2.3]]
passages.cleanText: You wake up feeling heavier than usual. With bleary eyes, you start your morning routine.

passages.text: Yaaaawnn. I feel like I slept nothing. Oh well. I better going so I'm not late. [[2.4]]
passages.cleanText: Yaaaawnn. I feel like I slept nothing. Oh well. I better going so I'm not late.

passages.text: You eat a filling breakfast and drink a cup of honey tea. [[2.5]]
passages.cleanText: You eat a filling breakfast and drink a cup of honey tea.

passages.text: You head out to deliver mail, first stopping by Cassrole Avenue. [[2.6]]
passages.cleanText: You head out to deliver mail, first stopping by Cassrole Avenue.

passages.text: Hi Marty! Thanks for taking that carrot delivery for me! And thanks for the mail! [[2.7]]
passages.cleanText: Hi Marty! Thanks for taking that carrot delivery for me! And thanks for the mail!

passages.text: No problem! Garden looks great by the way! So many carrots. See you later! [[2.8]]
passages.cleanText: No problem! Garden looks great by the way! So many carrots. See you later!

passages.text: Thank you Marty. [[2.9]]
passages.cleanText: Thank you Marty.

passages.text: Thanks Marty. Wow, you're yawning a lot today. [[2.10]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks Marty. Wow, you're yawning a lot today.

passages.text: Yeah.. didn't sleep too good. [[2.11]]
passages.cleanText: Yeah.. didn't sleep too good.

passages.text:
Oh yeah! Something weird happened yesterday... 
[[Tell him about the letter -> 2.12a]]
[[Don't tell him about the letter -> 2.12b]]

links.linkText: Don't tell him about the letter

passages.cleanText: Oh yeah! Something weird happened yesterday...

passages.name: 2.12a
passages.text: There was this letter in my paws.. and it just disappeared. [[2.13a]]
passages.cleanText: There was this letter in my paws.. and it just disappeared.

passages.name: 2.12b
passages.cleanText: Yes?

passages.name: 2.13b
passages.text: It's nothing. Just saw an odd letter yesterday with some weird writing. [[2.14b]]
passages.cleanText: It's nothing. Just saw an odd letter yesterday with some weird writing.

passages.text: Marty.. you're tired. [[2.16]]
passages.cleanText: Marty.. you're tired.

passages.text: I know, I know. But I just feel odd, you know? Do you believe me? [[2.17]]
passages.cleanText: I know, I know. But I just feel odd, you know? Do you believe me?

passages.text: Of course I do. You know I'm always on your side. Just get more rest. [[2.18]]
passages.cleanText: Of course I do. You know I'm always on your side. Just get more rest.

passages.text: You're right. See you tomorrow. [[2.19]]
passages.cleanText: You're right. See you tomorrow.

passages.text: You stop by Truffle Corner and knock on Mr. Smith's door again. [[2.20]]
passages.cleanText: You stop by Truffle Corner and knock on Mr. Smith's door again.

passages.text: Mr. Smith? [[2.21]]
passages.cleanText: Mr. Smith?

passages.text:
... 
[[Give up -> 2.22a]]
[[Try again -> 2.22b]]

passages.name: 2.22a
passages.text: You give up and put his letters in the mailbox. [[2.25]]
passages.cleanText: You give up and put his letters in the mailbox.

passages.name: 2.22b
passages.text: Mr. Smith? Are you home? [[2.23b]]
passages.cleanText: Mr. Smith? Are you home?

passages.name: 2.24b
passages.text: After waiting for 2 more minutes, you put his letters in the mailbox and leave. [[2.25]]
passages.cleanText: After waiting for 2 more minutes, you put his letters in the mailbox and leave.

passages.text: You go to Pepper Lane and see Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch. [[2.26]]
passages.cleanText: You go to Pepper Lane and see Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch.

passages.tags: marty_enter tofu_neutral marty_neutral sloth_neutral tofu_enter_right scotch_enter_right tofu_speaker
passages.text: Marty! Good morning! [[2.27]]
passages.cleanText: Marty! Good morning!

passages.text: Thanks Marty! [[2.28]]
passages.cleanText: Thanks Marty!

passages.text: You walk up the street to see a familiar purple cat. [[2.29]]
passages.cleanText: You walk up the street to see a familiar purple cat.

passages.text: Sir, did you see the big scary monster under your bed last night? [[2.30]]
passages.cleanText: Sir, did you see the big scary monster under your bed last night?

passages.text: Chester, there's nothing there. Now give these letters to your mom. [[2.30.1]]
passages.cleanText: Chester, there's nothing there. Now give these letters to your mom.

passages.text: Hee hee, but I know it's watching you! [[2.32]]
passages.cleanText: Hee hee, but I know it's watching you!

passages.text:
You're gonna end up just like those people who went missing! 
[["What do you mean?" -> 2.33a]]
[["That's not funny." -> 2.33b]]
passages.cleanText: You're gonna end up just like those people who went missing!

passages.name: 2.33a
passages.text: Like the mister who got taken away by the scary monsters under his bed! You're nex- [[2.34]]
passages.cleanText: Like the mister who got taken away by the scary monsters under his bed! You're nex-

passages.name: 2.33b
passages.text: Hehehehehehe well you won't be laughing when the big scary monster under your bed takes you awa- [[2.34]]
passages.cleanText: Hehehehehehe well you won't be laughing when the big scary monster under your bed takes you awa-
Yow!

passages.text: Sorry about that Marty. This one needs a spanking to learn his lesson. [[2.36]]
passages.cleanText: Sorry about that Marty. This one needs a spanking to learn his lesson.

passages.text: She turns and drags Chester towards the house. Before she can, he snickers and yells [[2.37]]
passages.cleanText: She turns and drags Chester towards the house. Before she can, he snickers and yells

passages.text: THEY'RE LYING! HAAHAHAHAHA BUT I KNOW THE TRUTH! [[2.38]]
passages.cleanText: THEY'RE LYING! HAAHAHAHAHA BUT I KNOW THE TRUTH!

passages.text:
What the.... 
[[Shrug it off -> 2.39a]]
[[Keep it in mind -> 2.39b]]
passages.cleanText: What the....

passages.name: 2.39a
passages.text: Sigh.. kids will be kids. Now I know why Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch don't have any. [[2.40]]
passages.cleanText: Sigh.. kids will be kids. Now I know why Mrs. Tofu and Mr. Scotch don't have any.

passages.name: 2.39b
passages.text:
You get goosebumps on your fur, recalling yesterday. But kids are just kids.. right?
[[2.40]]
passages.cleanText: You get goosebumps on your fur, recalling yesterday. But kids are just kids.. right?

passages.text:
You get to Mr. Schlawg's house and see his son, Peanut, sticking his head out from behind the door. His snout is quivering. [[2.41]] 
[[2.41 alt]]
passages.cleanText: You get to Mr. Schlawg's house and see his son, Peanut, sticking his head out from behind the door. His snout is quivering.

passages.text: He runs inside crying before you can even attempt to make him feel better. [[2.51]]
passages.cleanText: He runs inside crying before you can even attempt to make him feel better.

passages.text: I think.. kids are not for me. [[2.52]]
passages.cleanText: I think.. kids are not for me.

passages.text: You make your way to Honeybee Center. [[2.53]]
passages.cleanText: You make your way to Honeybee Center.

passages.text: When you arrive, Jane D. is not at her desk and Mayor Barnaby is nowhere in sight. [[2.54]]
passages.cleanText: When you arrive, Jane D. is not at her desk and Mayor Barnaby is nowhere in sight.

passages.text:
You drop off the mail on Jane's desk. As you turn to leave, you see Jane and Barnaby talking through a sliver of a cracked open door. 
[[Eavesdrop on their conversation -> 2.55]]
passages.cleanText: You drop off the mail on Jane's desk. As you turn to leave, you see Jane and Barnaby talking through a sliver of a cracked open door.

passages.text: I can't believe my eyes... [[2.56]]
passages.cleanText: I can't believe my eyes...

passages.text: Shhhh. No one needs to know. [[2.57]]
passages.cleanText: Shhhh. No one needs to know.

passages.text: You see Barnaby hand Jane an envelope. Out of the corner of your eye, you think you see the corner of green rectangles sticking out of it. [[2.58]]
passages.cleanText: You see Barnaby hand Jane an envelope. Out of the corner of your eye, you think you see the corner of green rectangles sticking out of it.

passages.text:
The truth can never get out. 
[[Confront them -> 2.60a]]
[[Quietly sneak away -> 2.60b]]
passages.cleanText: The truth can never get out.

passages.name: 2.60b
passages.text: You leave the building. But before you do, you grab the top letter in Barnaby's stack. It's "from" section is blank. Surely, he won't miss just one? [[2.68b]]
passages.cleanText: You leave the building. But before you do, you grab the top letter in Barnaby's stack. It's "from" section is blank. Surely, he won't miss just one?

passages.name: 2.60a
passages.text: You grab the mail from the desk and wait for Jane to leave the room. When she does a few minutes later, you intercept her. [[2.61a]]
passages.cleanText: You grab the mail from the desk and wait for Jane to leave the room. When she does a few minutes later, you intercept her.

passages.name: 2.61a
passages.text: Hey Jane! [[2.62a]]
passages.cleanText: Hey Jane!

passages.name: 2.62a
passages.text: Ah! Marty! Um, great to see you. [[2.63a]]
passages.cleanText: Ah! Marty! Um, great to see you.

passages.name: 2.63a
passages.text: Did you just get here? [[2.64a]]
passages.cleanText: Did you just get here?

passages.name: 2.64a
passages.text: Yup, just arrived. I was slow at walking so I was little late today. Was something going on? [[2.65a]]
passages.cleanText: Yup, just arrived. I was slow at walking so I was little late today. Was something going on?

passages.name: 2.65a
passages.text: Oh no, of course not. You know nothing ever happens in Honey Haven. Can I have my mail? [[2.66a]]
passages.cleanText: Oh no, of course not. You know nothing ever happens in Honey Haven. Can I have my mail?

passages.name: 2.66a
passages.cleanText: Here.

passages.name: 2.67a
passages.text: You hand her the stack of mail minus on letter which you kept pocketed in your satchel. The letter says "To: Barnaby, From __ " [[2.68]]
passages.cleanText: You hand her the stack of mail minus on letter which you kept pocketed in your satchel. The letter says "To: Barnaby, From __ "

passages.text: You bid Jane farewell and return home. It's dark out when you arrive. [[2.68.5]]
passages.cleanText: You bid Jane farewell and return home. It's dark out when you arrive.

passages.name: 2.69 cutscene
passages.text: cutscene: Nothing in this world is real... [[2.70]]
passages.cleanText: cutscene: Nothing in this world is real...

passages.text: What does this mean.. and what truth were Jane and Barnaby talking about? [[2.70.5]]
passages.cleanText: What does this mean.. and what truth were Jane and Barnaby talking about?

passages.text: I have to know the truth... yaawn. [[2.72]]
passages.cleanText: I have to know the truth... yaawn.

passages.text: Maybe tomorrow. I think I'll sleep early tonight. [[2.73]]
passages.cleanText: Maybe tomorrow. I think I'll sleep early tonight.

passages.text: You tuck yourself into bed and look up at the sky. The stars are beautiful and the moon.. [[2.75 cutscene]]
passages.cleanText: You tuck yourself into bed and look up at the sky. The stars are beautiful and the moon..

passages.name: 2.75 cutscene
passages.text: moon cutscene [[2.76]]
passages.cleanText: moon cutscene

passages.text: You blink and it disappears. The moon looks the same. Everything is quiet. [[2.78]]
passages.cleanText: You blink and it disappears. The moon looks the same. Everything is quiet.

passages.text: You close your windows and turn on a lamp. That night, you sleep facing the wall. [[2.79]]
passages.cleanText: You close your windows and turn on a lamp. That night, you sleep facing the wall.

passages.text: End of Day 2.
passages.cleanText: End of Day 2.

passages.name: 2.41 alt
passages.text:
H-h-hi Marty. You have a letter for me?? 
[["Yes, right here. -> 2.42a alt]] 
[["I don't know, do I?" -> 2.42b alt]]
passages.cleanText: H-h-hi Marty. You have a letter for me??

passages.name: 2.42a alt
passages.text:
W-w-woah! Do you think it could be from.. a secret admirer?
[["Who knows? Maybe!" -> 2.43a1 alt]]
[["Umm.. I wouldn't get your hopes up, kiddo." -> 2.43a2 alt]]

links.linkText: "Umm.. I wouldn't get your hopes up, kiddo."
links.original: [["Umm.. I wouldn't get your hopes up, kiddo." -> 2.43a2 alt]]

passages.cleanText: W-w-woah! Do you think it could be from.. a secret admirer?

passages.name: 2.42b alt
passages.text: Don't tease me! It's mean. You're just like Chester! [[2.45 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Don't tease me! It's mean. You're just like Chester!

passages.name: 2.43a1 alt
passages.text: Yeah, maybe! [[2.44a1 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Yeah, maybe!

passages.name: 2.43a2 alt
passages.text: Yeah, you're right. [[2.44a2 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Yeah, you're right.

passages.name: 2.44a1 alt
passages.text: ... or maybe it's just another "prank" from Chester. [[2.45 alt]]
passages.cleanText: ... or maybe it's just another "prank" from Chester.

passages.name: 2.45 alt
passages.text: Uh, is everything okay, kiddo? I just saw Chester down the street. [[2.46 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Uh, is everything okay, kiddo? I just saw Chester down the street.

passages.name: 2.44a2 alt
passages.text: It's probably just another "prank" from Chester. [[2.45 alt]]
passages.cleanText: It's probably just another "prank" from Chester.

passages.name: 2.46 alt
passages.text: You talked to him?! [[2.47 alt]]
passages.cleanText: You talked to him?!

passages.name: 2.47 alt
passages.text: Don't EVER trust a word out of his mouth. [[2.48 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Don't EVER trust a word out of his mouth.

passages.name: 2.48 alt
passages.text: He's always trying to get you. [[2.49 alt]]
passages.cleanText: He's always trying to get you.

passages.name: 2.49 alt
passages.text: L-like that time he spritzed me with a spray bottle when I said something "dorkish." [[2.50 alt]]
passages.cleanText: L-like that time he spritzed me with a spray bottle when I said something "dorkish."

passages.name: 2.50 alt
passages.text: Or that time he wrote "Pissnut" on my forehead! [[2.51 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Or that time he wrote "Pissnut" on my forehead!

passages.name: 2.51 alt
passages.text: And then when you finally trust him... [[2.52 alt]]
passages.cleanText: And then when you finally trust him...

passages.name: 2.52 alt
passages.text: He tells the whole school that you have a crush on your best friend Julian and calls you "Homeo" for a week! [[2.53 alt]]
passages.cleanText: He tells the whole school that you have a crush on your best friend Julian and calls you "Homeo" for a week!

passages.name: 2.53 alt
passages.text: Homeo and Juliet, sitting in a tree... [[2.54 alt]]
passages.cleanText: Homeo and Juliet, sitting in a tree...

passages.name: 2.54 alt
passages.text: AHHHH I CAN'T UNHEAR IT! [[2.50]]
passages.cleanText: AHHHH I CAN'T UNHEAR IT!

passages.name: 2.68b
passages.text: You leave the building and head home. When you arrive, it's already dark out. [[2.68.5]]
passages.cleanText: You leave the building and head home. When you arrive, it's already dark out.

passages.text: Are they hiding something from the rest of Honey Haven? But if they are, why does Barnaby sound so afraid? [[2.71]]
passages.cleanText: Are they hiding something from the rest of Honey Haven? But if they are, why does Barnaby sound so afraid?

passages.text: After you shower, curiosity gets the best of you. You open the mysterious letter to Barnaby. It reads: [[2.69 cutscene]]
passages.cleanText: After you shower, curiosity gets the best of you. You open the mysterious letter to Barnaby. It reads:

passages.text: Only if you can outrun me! [[2.30.2]]
passages.cleanText: Only if you can outrun me!
What-

passages.text: Before you realize what's happening, Chester starts charging at you, lollipop in hand. [[2.30.4 minigame]]
passages.cleanText: Before you realize what's happening, Chester starts charging at you, lollipop in hand.

passages.name: 2.30.4 minigame
passages.text: start of chester chase minigame [[2.30.5]]
passages.cleanText: start of chester chase minigame

passages.text: Chester! Enough playing. Give these letters to your mom. [[2.30.6]]
passages.cleanText: Chester! Enough playing. Give these letters to your mom.

passages.text: And stop chasing me and saying you're the monster. It's a little bit odd, frankly. [[2.31]]
passages.cleanText: And stop chasing me and saying you're the monster. It's a little bit odd, frankly.
